headings: b. Enrolled Parties and Excluded Parties.
text: - i. Included Parties. Owner, General Contractor, and all eligible Subcontractors  of  all  tiers  that  are  enrolled  in  the  OCIP,  and  any  other person or entity the Owner may designate in its sole discretion, who enroll in  the  OCIP  and  receive  confirmation  of  enrollment  from  the  OCIP Administrator  shall  be  Enrolled  Parties.  A  party  performing  labor  or providing services at the Project Site is eligible to enroll in the OCIP, unless such party is an Excluded Party. A party shall be an Enrolled Party only when that party properly completes and submits all necessary forms and has received a certificate of insurance from the OCIP Administrator evidencing enrollment  in  the  OCIP.    General  Contractor  and  Subcontractors  shall obtain and maintain the insurance coverage specified in Section II.
